description_long: This is a large, rectangular pole-mounted advertising board with a prominent display area. The front face features a printed advertisement for the UCF Knights, including their logo and text in black, gold, and white. The structure is supported by a single cylindrical pole and reinforced with a metal framework visible from the sides and top. A metal ladder is attached to the pole, providing access for maintenance. The back of the board is blank, and the frame appears to be made of metal with a weathered, industrial finish. The overall design is robust, suitable for outdoor urban environments, and intended for high visibility.
description: A large, pole-mounted advertising board with a UCF Knights ad on the front, metal frame, and maintenance ladder.
description_view_0: Front view showing the UCF Knights advertisement, main display area, and attached ladder.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the metal framework and depth of the board, with structural supports visible.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a blank display surface and the supporting pole with ladder.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlighting the metal framework and support structure.
attribute_frame_design: thick metal frame with industrial finish and visible support trusses
attribute_advertisement_content: static printed advertisement for UCF Knights with logo and text
